label: Orbital debris
description: Defines a set of layered world-map graphics used to render orbital debris belts around a planet. Each def names a debris type (asteroid field, manmade wreckage, mechanoid debris) and supplies a weighted list of graphic variants rendered with parallax depth effects.

graphics.label: Graphics
graphics.description: List of debris graphic variants. The renderer selects and layers these based on weighting and order. Each <li> is a DebrisGraphic.

new-orbital-debris.label: New orbital debris
new-orbital-debris.description: Minimal orbital debris def with a single graphic variant.
